series_metadata.series_description: Any/all correspondence relating to QStP(a service improvement process) teams; charters, agendas, minutes, proposals, pilot implementation & full implementation, Team-Up/Team Expo information, members of teams, date team ws recognized, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years for reference purposes, review by State Archivist, then recycle or retain according to State Archivist recommendation. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years for reference purposes, review by State Archivist, then recycle or retain according to State Archivist recommendation., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
